name: usaha-id
description: Multi-entity Indonesian business operations for Cowork/Claude Code. Entity-aware router (PT ANI, PT MMI, IJBA, Glu, portfolio) plus payroll (BPJS + PPh 21 TER), month-end close (PSAK + Coretax), tax prep, mining royalty/PNBP + HPM, and a multi-entity Monday brief. Localized rebuild of Anthropic's Small Business plugin on Indonesian regulatory rails. You approve every step that touches money, a counterparty, or a government filing.
